name: Famous Amos Raisin-Filled Choc Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 375°F. Beat margarine, brown and white sugars, vanilla, 1 teaspoon water, and eggs with an electric mixer in a large bowl until creamy and thoroughly blended. Stir in flour, baking soda, and salt until well mixed. Gently stir in raisins and chocolate chips. Spoon the dough by teaspoonfuls onto cookie sheets, leaving about 1 to 1 1/2 inches between cookies. Bake for 8 minutes or until the cookies are browned to your liking. Yield: About 6 dozen.
